backstory.original: Talin Uran is a rogue of great renown within Waterdeep. While on an assignment with the Grambar's Blades a few years ago, he was caught in a building collapse which left him paralysed from the waist down. Now equipped with his combat wheelchair, Talin is back to doing what he does best: Saving the day and looking awesome doing it.
backstory.display: 塔林·乌兰是深水城里名气很大的游荡者。几年前，他在为葛兰巴之刃执行任务时，被卷入一场建筑坍塌事故，导致他腰部以下瘫痪。如今塔林装备了战斗轮椅，重新开始做他最擅长的事情：拯救世界的同时保持炫酷。

description.original: Talin disappears into the shadows and stabs a random enemy with his rapier.
description.display: 塔林消失在阴影中，然后用西洋剑刺向一名随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Talin disappears into the shadows and reappears behind a random enemy, stabbing them with his rapier. He then shadowsteps back into the formation.
longDescription.display: 塔林消失在阴影中，重新出现在一名随机敌人身后，然后用他的西洋剑发动刺杀。随后他会用暗影步回到阵型中。

description.original: Talin throws a hoop blade in a large looping arc, damaging all enemies it encounters before returning to Talin.
description.display: 塔林扔出轮形飞刃，划出一个大圆弧，对遭遇的所有敌人造成伤害，随后回到塔林手中。

longDescription.original: Talin detaches a secondary hoop-shaped blade from his wheelchair's rear wheel and flings it at the farthest enemy. It travels in a large looping arc, damaging all enemies it encounters before returning to Talin.
longDescription.display: 塔林扔出轮椅后轮上的次要轮形飞刃，让其飞向最远处的敌人。脉轮会划出一个大圆弧，对遭遇的所有敌人造成伤害，随后回到塔林手中。

description.original: Talin scatters tacks where he attacks monsters, the tacks stay behind and slow monsters in the area.
description.display: 塔林在攻击怪物时会播撒图钉，留下的图钉会减速该区域的怪物。

description.original: Talin debuffs Evil Champions , but buffs Good Chamions based on the number of Evil Champions.
description.display: 塔林对邪恶阵营勇士造成减益，但会根据邪恶阵营勇士的数量为善良阵营勇士提供增益。

conditions.desc: When Talin attacks with Quiet Ambush he leaves behind a set of Scatter Tacks which cause enemies standing on them to be slowed by 75% and take $(amount)% more damage from attacks.
When Talin attacks with Quiet Ambush he leaves behind a set of Scatter Tacks which cause enemies standing on them to be slowed by 50% and take $(amount)% more damage from attacks.
塔林使用无声伏击攻击敌人时，会在身后留下一组播撒图钉，使踩在上面的敌人被减速 75%，并且受到的伤害提升 $(amount)%
塔林使用无声伏击攻击敌人时，会在身后留下一组播撒图钉，使踩在上面的敌人被减速 50%，并且受到的伤害提升 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Talin scatters tacks behind him after attacking, slowing enemies that walk in that area.
tipText.display: 塔林发动攻击后播撒图钉，使走过该区域的敌人减速。

description.pre: Talin increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)%. This ability is increased by $(amount_per_stack)% for each enemy killed in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $(talin_weakness_max_stacks) kills. The effect is reduced by $(reduction_per_slot)% for each slot past one a given Champion is away from Talin(stacking multiplicatively).
塔林提升所有勇士 $(amount)% 伤害。当前区域内每有一名敌人被击杀，此技能效果提升 $(amount_per_stack)%。以乘算方式堆叠，最多计算 $(talin_weakness_max_stacks) 次击杀。特定勇士距离塔林每远一格，此效果就减少 $(reduction_per_slot)%（以乘算方式堆叠）。

tipText.original: Talin observes weaknesses of enemies and whispers them to nearby Champions increasing their damage.
tipText.display: 塔林观察到敌人的弱点，并低声告诉附近的勇士，以提高他们的伤害。

conditions.desc: Talin decreases the DPS of Good Champions in the formation by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, but increases the damage of Evil Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good Champion, stacking multiplicatively.

Talin decreases the DPS of Evil Champions in the formation by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, but increases the damage of Good Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Evil Champion, stacking multiplicatively.
塔林使阵型中所有善良阵营勇士的伤害输出降低 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，但阵型中每有一名善良阵营的勇士，都会提升所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。
塔林使阵型中所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害输出降低 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，但阵型中每有一名邪恶阵营的勇士，都会提升所有善良阵营勇士的伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。

description.desc: Increases the stack cap and damage buff of Spot Weakness by $(amount)%.
提升洞察弱点的层数堆叠上限和伤害加成 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Talin focuses on enemy weaknesses, increasing the damage of nearby Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 塔林专注于敌人的弱点，提高附近勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the slow effect, radius, and damage of Scatter Tacks by $(amount)% (multiplicatively).
提升播撒图钉的减速效果、半径和伤害 $(amount)%（乘算）

specializationDescription.original: Talin focuses on scattering tacks, slowing more monsters.
specializationDescription.display: 塔林专注于播撒图钉，使更多怪物减速。

description.desc: Reverse the effect of Antagonist, decreasing the damage of Good Champions and increasing the damage of Evil Champions based on the number of Good Champions.
反转此消彼长的效果，降低善良阵营勇士的伤害，并基于阵型中善良阵营勇士的数量，提升邪恶阵营勇士的伤害

specializationDescription.original: Talin prefers the company of Evil, increasing the damage of Evil Champions at a cost to Good Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 塔林更喜欢与邪恶为伍，牺牲善良勇士的输出，使邪恶勇士的伤害提高。

description.original: Follow my tracks, I'll show you the way.
description.display: 跟随我的脚步，我会给你指路。

description.original: I am many things. A quitter is not one of them.
description.display: 我有很多特点，但轻言放弃绝不是其中之一。

description.original: They're favoring their right side. Strike them there.
description.display: 他们习惯用右侧，就从那里攻击他们。

description.original: Flip the table and dive out of the way. I've got them lined up.
description.display: 掀翻桌子跳开。我已经让他们排好队了。

description.original: Now THOSE are some scatter tacks!
description.display: 这样的播撒图钉才像样嘛！

effects.description: Increases the radius of Talin's Scatter Tacks by 50%.

description.original: Is that true?
description.display: 是真的吗？

description.original: Watch when they come in the room.
description.display: 且看他们进入房间后的下场吧。

description.original: Damaged in the same accident that paralyzed me.
description.display: 它在导致我瘫痪的那场事故中损坏了。

description.original: It isn't new any more. But then again, neither am I.
description.display: 它已经不新了。但话说回来，我也不再年轻了。

description.original: There's a lot of history tied to that weld on the blade.
description.display: 这刀片上的焊缝有着很多历史。

description.original: We don't back down.
description.display: 我们是不会退缩的。

description.original: You'd be surprised how often this gets me out of jams!
description.display: 这东西让我摆脱困境的次数会让你大吃一惊！

name.display: 卓尔无赖佣兵公会徽章

description.original: Don't tell Jarlaxle.
description.display: 别告诉贾拉索。

description.original: Keep this in your pocket while in the Dock Ward. Tell 'em Talin Uran sent you.
description.display: 在港口区的时候把这东西放进你的口袋里。跟他们说是塔林·乌兰派你来的。

description.original: Nat made it after my latest argument with Jarlaxle. I have no idea where she got the feather...
description.display: 在我最近一次跟贾拉索吵架之后，纳特就做了这东西。我不知道她是从哪儿搞到羽毛的......

description.original: If you twist the pole in a counter-clockwise motion, the light extinguishes.
description.display: 如果你逆时针旋转那根杆，灯就会熄灭。

description.original: It's a bit more subtle than the time Ezmerelda cast light on my whole wheelchair.
description.display: 这比艾丝美拉达照亮我的整张轮椅那次还要更微妙一点。

description.original: A gift from Ulkoria, an old friend from Waterdeep.
description.display: 乌尔科莉亚送的礼物，她是我一个在深水城的老朋友。

description.original: The Champions don't give up. Never forget that.
description.display: 勇士队是永不言弃的。永远不要忘记这点。

description.original: I upgraded my tires, don't worry.
description.display: 我升级了我的车胎，别担心。

description.original: They don't look so fast NOW do they?
description.display: 它们现在看起来没那么快了，对吧？

description.original: Did you think this was my first adventure?
description.display: 你以为这是我的第一次冒险吗？

description.original: Baeloth makes his big entrance, and I'm on our exit distraction, got it.
description.display: 贝洛斯一进来，我就想办法分散他的注意力，好让我们溜走，懂了。

description.original: That muck? Won't be a problem.
description.display: 那脏东西？不是什么问题。

description.original: No friction burns, and I can still pick a lock with finesse!
description.display: 不会有擦伤，而且我还能灵巧地撬开锁呢！

description.original: I had them commissioned after my last trip into Undermountain. Yuck.
description.display: 这是我上次去地脉迷城后委托他们做的，啐。

description.original: Watch me now!
description.display: 现在看着我！

description.original: You should have seen them after Avernus!
description.display: 你真该看看它们在阿弗纳斯之后的样子！

description.original: They attach to the outside of my push rims and detach with a quick wrist flick.
description.display: 它们与我的推动轮圈相连，一甩手腕就会分离。

description.original: I said we can never have enough targets, but I might have been mistaken. DUCK!
description.display: 我说过我们永远不会有足够的目标，但我可能错了。躲开！

description.original: Only for special occasions.
description.display: 仅用于特殊场合。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Talin Uran is a rogue of great renown within Waterdeep. While on an assignment with the Grambar's Blades a few years ago, he was caught in a building collapse which left him paralysed from the waist down. Now equipped with his combat wheelchair, Talin is back to doing what he does best: Saving the day and looking awesome doing it.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Talin buffs other Champions damage based on proximity and alignment, and slows enemies in the areas he attacks

event_upgrades.name: Scatter Tacks
event_upgrades.description: Talin scatters tacks where he attacks monsters, the tacks stay behind and slow monsters in the area.

event_upgrades.name: Antagonist
event_upgrades.description: Talin debuffs Evil Champions , but buffs Good Chamions based on the number of Evil Champions.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 塔林·乌兰是深水城里名气很大的游荡者。几年前，他在为葛兰巴之刃执行任务时，被卷入一场建筑坍塌事故，导致他腰部以下瘫痪。如今塔林装备了战斗轮椅，重新开始做他最擅长的事情：拯救世界的同时保持炫酷。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 塔林会根据距离和阵营为其他勇士提供伤害增益，并减速他攻击区域内的敌人。

event_upgrades.name: 播撒图钉
event_upgrades.description: 塔林在攻击怪物时会播撒图钉，留下的图钉会减速该区域的怪物。

event_upgrades.name: 此消彼长
event_upgrades.description: 塔林对邪恶阵营勇士造成减益，但会根据邪恶阵营勇士的数量为善良阵营勇士提供增益。

original.description: Talin disappears into the shadows and stabs a random enemy with his rapier.
original.long_description: Talin disappears into the shadows and reappears behind a random enemy, stabbing them with his rapier. He then shadowsteps back into the formation.

display.name: 无声伏击
display.description: 塔林消失在阴影中，然后用西洋剑刺向一名随机敌人。
display.long_description: 塔林消失在阴影中，重新出现在一名随机敌人身后，然后用他的西洋剑发动刺杀。随后他会用暗影步回到阵型中。

original.name: Razor Edged Chakram
original.description: Talin throws a hoop blade in a large looping arc, damaging all enemies it encounters before returning to Talin.
original.long_description: Talin detaches a secondary hoop-shaped blade from his wheelchair's rear wheel and flings it at the farthest enemy. It travels in a large looping arc, damaging all enemies it encounters before returning to Talin.

display.long_description: 塔林扔出轮椅后轮上的次要轮形飞刃，让其飞向最远处的敌人。脉轮会划出一个大圆弧，对遭遇的所有敌人造成伤害，随后回到塔林手中。

original.tip_text: Talin observes weaknesses of enemies and whispers them to nearby Champions increasing their damage.

display.name: 寻路者

display.name: 加倍播撒图钉
display.specialization_description: 塔林专注于播撒图钉，使更多怪物减速。

display.name: 命运逆转
display.specialization_description: 塔林更喜欢与邪恶为伍，牺牲善良勇士的输出，使邪恶勇士的伤害提高。

display.name: 无私

original.name: Inspiring Leader

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我有很多特点，但轻言放弃绝不是其中之一。

original.name: Analytical Nature
original.description: They're favoring their right side. Strike them there.

display.name: 解析自然
display.description: 他们习惯用右侧，就从那里攻击他们。

original.name: Read the Room
original.description: Flip the table and dive out of the way. I've got them lined up.

display.name: 眼力
display.description: 掀翻桌子跳开。我已经让他们排好队了。

original.name: Quick-Release Hook
original.description: Now THOSE are some scatter tacks!

effects.description: Increases the radius of Talin's Scatter Tacks by 50%.

display.name: 速脱钩
display.description: 这样的播撒图钉才像样嘛！

effects.description: 使塔林的“播撒图钉”的范围增加 50%。

original.name: Tavern Negotiator
original.description: Is that true?

display.name: 旅店谈判者
display.description: 是真的吗？

original.name: Surprise Terrain
original.description: Watch when they come in the room.

display.name: 意外地形
display.description: 且看他们进入房间后的下场吧。

original.name: Repaired Rapier
original.description: Damaged in the same accident that paralyzed me.

display.name: 修好的西洋剑
display.description: 它在导致我瘫痪的那场事故中损坏了。

original.name: Trusty Old Blade
original.description: It isn't new any more. But then again, neither am I.

display.name: 可靠的老旧之刃
display.description: 它已经不新了。但话说回来，我也不再年轻了。

original.name: Lifelong Companion
original.description: There's a lot of history tied to that weld on the blade.

display.name: 一生的伙伴
display.description: 这刀片上的焊缝有着很多历史。

original.name: Tenacious Blade
original.description: We don't back down.

display.name: 顽强之刃
display.description: 我们是不会退缩的。

original.name: Spider Badge
original.description: You'd be surprised how often this gets me out of jams!

display.name: 蜘蛛徽章
display.description: 这东西让我摆脱困境的次数会让你大吃一惊！

original.name: Bregan D'aerthe Badge
original.description: Don't tell Jarlaxle.

display.name: 卓尔无赖佣兵公会徽章
display.description: 别告诉贾拉索。

original.name: Grambar's Blades Brooch
original.description: Keep this in your pocket while in the Dock Ward. Tell 'em Talin Uran sent you.

display.name: 葛兰巴之刃胸针
display.description: 在港口区的时候把这东西放进你的口袋里。跟他们说是塔林·乌兰派你来的。

original.name: Champion's Badge
original.description: Nat made it after my latest argument with Jarlaxle. I have no idea where she got the feather...

display.name: 勇士徽章
display.description: 在我最近一次跟贾拉索吵架之后，纳特就做了这东西。我不知道她是从哪儿搞到羽毛的......

original.name: Hanging Lantern
original.description: If you twist the pole in a counter-clockwise motion, the light extinguishes.

display.name: 挂灯
display.description: 如果你逆时针旋转那根杆，灯就会熄灭。

original.name: Lit Lamp
original.description: It's a bit more subtle than the time Ezmerelda cast light on my whole wheelchair.

display.name: 点着的灯
display.description: 这比艾丝美拉达照亮我的整张轮椅那次还要更微妙一点。

original.name: Ornate Lamp
original.description: A gift from Ulkoria, an old friend from Waterdeep.

display.name: 华丽的灯
display.description: 乌尔科莉亚送的礼物，她是我一个在深水城的老朋友。

original.name: Prismatic Lamp
original.description: The Champions don't give up. Never forget that.

display.name: 棱镜灯
display.description: 勇士队是永不言弃的。永远不要忘记这点。

original.name: Caltrops
original.description: I upgraded my tires, don't worry.

display.name: 铁蒺藜
display.description: 我升级了我的车胎，别担心。

original.name: Parting Gifts
original.description: They don't look so fast NOW do they?

display.name: 分别礼物
display.description: 它们现在看起来没那么快了，对吧？

original.name: Scatter Tacks
original.description: Did you think this was my first adventure?

display.name: 播撒图钉
display.description: 你以为这是我的第一次冒险吗？

original.name: Smokepowder Tacks
original.description: Baeloth makes his big entrance, and I'm on our exit distraction, got it.

display.name: 烟粉图钉
display.description: 贝洛斯一进来，我就想办法分散他的注意力，好让我们溜走，懂了。

original.name: Well-Worn Gloves
original.description: That muck? Won't be a problem.

display.name: 磨损的手套
display.description: 那脏东西？不是什么问题。

original.name: Fingerless Grips
original.description: No friction burns, and I can still pick a lock with finesse!

display.name: 无指抓爪
display.description: 不会有擦伤，而且我还能灵巧地撬开锁呢！

original.name: Combat Wheelchair Gloves
original.description: I had them commissioned after my last trip into Undermountain. Yuck.

display.name: 战斗轮椅手套
display.description: 这是我上次去地脉迷城后委托他们做的，啐。

original.name: Ornate Gloves of Speed
original.description: Watch me now!

display.name: 华丽的速度手套
display.description: 现在看着我！

original.name: Sharp Rims
original.description: You should have seen them after Avernus!

display.name: 锋利的轮圈
display.description: 你真该看看它们在阿弗纳斯之后的样子！

original.name: Hoop-Shaped Blades
original.description: They attach to the outside of my push rims and detach with a quick wrist flick.

display.name: 环型利刃
display.description: 它们与我的推动轮圈相连，一甩手腕就会分离。

original.name: Razor Edges
original.description: I said we can never have enough targets, but I might have been mistaken. DUCK!

display.name: 剃刀边缘
display.description: 我说过我们永远不会有足够的目标，但我可能错了。躲开！

original.name: Slicer and Dicer
original.description: Only for special occasions.

display.name: 切片器和切丁器
display.description: 仅用于特殊场合。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
所有非二元性别勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
